steps.title: Focus on Oak Tree House
steps.content: The task asks for an advantage of Oak Tree House. The relevant notes say it was built under a rock overhang, and those ledges protected the site from heavy rain and snow.

steps.title: Use only relevant notes
steps.content: Choice A says there was an advantage but does not explain it. Choice B gives location and dates only. Choice C applies Yucca House's flat terrain to Oak Tree House, which is not supported. The needed sentence states the overhang's protection. The answer is D.
